controls.abuseProtection: IP, device, and free-path throttles protect provider calls without replacing Firebase UID entitlement authority.
controls.freeAi: OpenAI mini only, capped output, trimmed history, deterministic fallback when provider is unavailable.
controls.premiumAi: Premium model only for premium deep intent or premium report pipeline.
controls.telemetry: Provider, model, feature, user plan, entitlement source, product credit source, token usage, estimated cost, cache state, and cache hit are captured.
controls.validator: Gemini validator is blocked for free/non-premium and allowed only for premium paid report QA.
